title: 05_interpretation_single
description: One per-(matrix_id, principle_id) interpretation artifact emitted by the triz-principle-interpreter subagent. Carries principle_canonical_id and interpretation_lineage so the synthesizer can dedup at the principle-list layer while preserving distinct angles at the interpretation layer (design v6 S9.5a, S9.6a).

principle_id.description: Native principle id within the host matrix (string to accommodate prefixed ids; numeric ids are stringified).

principle_canonical_id.description: Cross-matrix canonical id (amendment 3). Used by the synthesizer for list-level dedup.

interpretation_lineage.description: The interpretive tradition this principle is being read through. Two interpretations sharing principle_canonical_id but differing here are distinct angles and must NOT be deduplicated downstream.

concrete_suggestion.description: Domain-specific concrete suggestion synthesized from the principle for the user's problem.

applies_how.description: Brief explanation of how the principle maps onto the contradiction in this domain.

interpretation_caveat.description: Optional caveat (e.g. 'matrix is LLM-generated; cross-validate against altshuller-40 if available' for triz-ai-extended).
